arts.ttl: Leicester vs Liverpool LIVE: Reds look to seal Premier League title against struggling Foxes
arts.sum: Arne Slot’s Reds could secure the Premier League title with victory today if other results go their way

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy addresses Jannik Vestergaard omission as two covering players named
arts.sum: Caleb Okoli was called up from the bench to the 11, but Vestergaard still did not make the squad, van Nistelrooy choosing to go without a centre-back deputy, instead including the likes of teenagers Jake Evans and Bade Aluko among his substitutes. Jannik Vestergaard’s continued Leicester City absence is purely a “technical and tactical decision”, Ruud van Nistelrooy insists, with other players able to fill in where the centre-back might be needed.

arts.ttl: Leicester City goalkeeper braced for Championship summer transfer offer after wasted season
arts.sum: Daniel Iversen is wanted by Preston North End with the Leicester City goalkeeper tipped to leave the club this summer. Iversen is set to become a free agent with his current Foxes deal set to expire at the end of the campaign with the club destined to return to the Championship.

arts.ttl: The results Liverpool need today to win the Premier League and end Arsenal hope
arts.sum: Liverpool are closing in on the Premier League title and a win over Leicester on Sunday would be enough - but they need Arsenal to slip up against Ipswich first

arts.ttl: Leicester City vs Liverpool LIVE - Arsenal updates, team news, kick-off time, TV channel, score
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (Joe Rimmer, Ian Doyle, Paul Gorst, Matt C Jones)
arts.sum: Live updates from the King Power as Liverpool take on Leicester City looking to take one step closer to the Premier League title

arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez and four Liverpool stars drop team news hints amid Arne Slot warning
arts.sum: Liverpool will be in Premier League action at the King Power Stadium this afternoon

arts.ttl: Liverpool's likely title parade plans and how fans will celebrate Premier League crown
arts.sum: Liverpool are almost certain to win the Premier League title within the coming weeks, with supporters desperate to celebrate with the team having been stopped back in 2020

arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta issues 12-word verdict as Liverpool close in on title
arts.sum: Arsenal have collapsed in the title race and now it's only a matter of time before Liverpool are crowned champions - but Gunners boss Mikel Arteta is keen to make sure the Reds' coronation is delayed

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk told what he must do to rival Paolo Maldini after new Liverpool contract
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk has been told he must win one more trophy now that he has signed his Liverpool contract extension

arts.ttl: Liverpool plot €75-80m move for 19-goal star, transfer could benefit Man United
arts.sum: Liverpool are interested in signing Mason Greenwood at the end of the season, and they would be willing to spend a substantial amount of money on him. The 23-year-old has managed to get his career back on track with a move to Marseille, and he has been outstanding this season.
